wpPage.title: Privacy Policy
wpPage.content:
Welcome to emqube.com. Your privacy is fundamentally important to us. This Privacy Policy outlines how Emqube LLC (“we,” “our,” or “us”), located at PO Box 111248, Dubai, UAE, handles user information on our website. We believe in complete transparency and have structured this policy to be straightforward, practical, and easy to understand.

1. Essential Cookies Only

By default, our website only deploys very essential technical cookies necessary for the secure, stable, and smooth operation of the site. We do not use intrusive tracking cookies or harvest personal data in the background without your knowledge.

2. Standard Web Analytics

To help us understand how visitors interact with our content and optimize user experience, emqube.com is tracked by Google Analytics. This platform provides us with anonymous, aggregated traffic data (such as page views, time spent on site, and regional location) without identifying you as an individual.

3. Contact Form Data Entry

When you choose to fill out a form on our website to contact us, your submitted information (such as your name, email address, corporate details, and inquiry message) is routed directly into our secure internal CRM system.

4. Zero External Data Sharing

We maintain a strict zero-sharing policy. Your personal details and inquiry data are never sold, leased, rented, or shared with any external third parties, marketing agencies, or outside partners. Your information remains entirely confidential within Emqube LLC.

5. Strictly No Unsolicited Campaigns

Submitting an inquiry through our contact form will never automatically add you to an email marketing blast or automated drip sequence. We do not believe in spam. Unless you explicitly check a box to opt-in to a specific newsletter or update stream, your data is exclusively used to contact you directly regarding your specific request.

6. Corporate Contact & Compliance

If you have any questions regarding your data, or if you would like to request the correction or permanent deletion of your contact details from our CRM database, please reach out to our local team directly at our registered corporate address:

Emqube LLC

PO Box 111248,

Dubai, United Arab Emirates

Website: emqube.com
